title: Revanchist (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''Revanchist''' could refer to two things:

*'''[[Revan/Legends|Revan]]''', a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] who became Darth Revan, but was redeemed by the conclusion of the [[Jedi Civil War]].
*'''[[Revanchist]]s''', a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] referred to as the Revanchists who supported facing the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] against the wishes of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].

{{Disambig}}
